author: @BrandonNinja
text:
Here’s how the Night 2 finish could’ve been saved: 

Charlotte Flair comes out to stop Cena, believing she’s protecting her father’s legacy. But her interference backfires and unintentionally helps Cena win. She slides a chair into the ring for Cody, thinking he’ll use it—but Cody, being a babyface, refuses. While Charlotte distracts the ref, Cena takes advantage, low-blows Cody, then hits an Attitude Adjustment onto the steel chair. 1...2...3. Cena wins.
Charlotte is left devastated, even yanking out her extensions in frustration. The crowd boos her relentlessly—but that’s fine, because she’s a heel.
